hooks.command: result=$(cd "c:/wamp64/www/GestoSecu" && npx gitnexus status 2>&1 | tr '\n' ' '); echo "[GitNexus] $result"; if echo "$result" | grep -qiE 'stale|outdated|no index|not indexed|behind'; then exit 2; fi
hooks.rewakeMessage: L'index GitNexus est obsolète — relancer `npx gitnexus analyze`. Statut détecté :

hooks.command: result=$(cd "c:/wamp64/www/GestoSecu" && npx gitnexus status 2>&1 | tr '\n' ' '); printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[GitNexus post-commit] %s — Si stale, lancer: npx gitnexus analyze"}}\n' "$result"

result=$(cd "c:/wamp64/www/GestoSecu" && npx gitnexus status 2>&1 | tr '\n' ' '); printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[GitNexus post-merge] %s — Si stale, lancer: npx gitnexus analyze"}}\n' "$result"
